desc:
f17v 特征描述

茎与花：多分枝纤细主茎。顶端开有数朵红色星形小花，花瓣通常为五片。
叶片：深绿色。边缘呈剧烈的锯齿状（类似荨麻或枫叶），叶片较小且密集分布于茎秆两侧。
根部：双球状块根。呈浅褐色，两个圆形块茎相连，下方生有短小的须根。

Stem & Flowers: Multi-branched slender stems. Several small red star-shaped flowers at the tips, typically with five petals.
Leaves: Deep green. Highly serrated edges (resembling nettle or maple leaves), small and densely distributed along the stems.
Roots: Double globular tuberous roots. Light brown, consisting of two connected rounded tubers with short fibrous roots underneath.
